subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! This is the day when the light of servitude dawneth from the horizon of all regions, the time of its rising and radiance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی میثاق الیوم یوم اشراق نور عبودیت از مطلع آفاقست و هنگام طلوع و سطوع
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @call to action, @methods of teaching the Cause
